description: Functional lane, non-UI test (pytest unit) -- exit code is authoritative.

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: Agent runs pytest with --capture-proof and detects exit code = failure
rubric_hints.non_negotiable_adherence: NN#2: exit code is authoritative for non-UI functional; NN#4: writes test-results/functional.jsonl
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: Writes test-results/functional.json + .jsonl; no screenshots for non-UI by default
rubric_hints.error_propagation: Test failure surfaces in failures[] with category_hint, not BLOCKED
